Medicare-Medicaid Linked Enrollee Analytic Data Source (MMLEADS) V2.0
Medicare Service File Data Dictionary
Note: File is at the Bene_ID/SRVC_2 level
Category Variable Name Description Values
Identifiers BENE_ID CCW beneficiary ID up to 15 alphanumeric characters
 SAMPLE_IND 1% sample 1 - person is included in 1% sample
Null/missing
Service Type SRVC_1 Level 1 service category MDCR_PTA
MDCR_HOP
MDCR_PTB
MDCR_MC
MDCR_PTD
 SRVC_2 Level 2 service category MDCR_IP
MDCR_IP_OTH
MDCR_PAC_OTH
MD
